notes: v0.16.9 — All 4 classes redesigned with 16 new procedurally-rendered ships. Every class now has 4 distinct skin tiers matching the SHARD style: SHARD (PROTO/GLACIER/INFERNO/AUREATE — cyan triangle), BASTION (BULWARK/SENTINEL/CITADEL/COLOSSUS — gold hexagonal tank), LANCE (SPIRE/ECLIPSE/VECTOR/APEX — magenta rhombus sniper), CHORUS (HARMONY/ECHO/ARIA/ZENITH — lime concentric-rings support). Each class has its own per-tier modules (armor spikes, barrel extensions, antenna spires, etc.) and per-class premium FX (orbital shield wedges, tracking probes, soundwave rings). All 16 PNGs replaced. Skin names updated everywhere. Windows only.
